'''EV-9D9.2''' was a [[Gender/Legends|feminine]] [[MerenData/Legends|MerenData]] [[EV-series supervisor droid/Legends|EV-series supervisor droid]] and the successor to [[EV-9D9/Legends|EV-9D9]]. She was said to be twice as ruthless as EV-9D9, her predecessor. She was head of [[Cyborg/Legends|cyborg]] operations within the [[Droid/Legends|droid]] factories of [[Telti/Legends|Telti]]. She was also responsible for the [[Torture/Legends|torture]] of [[Cole Fardreamer]], when he was captured and imprisoned on Telti.

She was deactivated, along with the other droids of Telti, by [[R2-D2/Legends|R2-D2]] and [[C-3PO/Legends|C-3PO]]. R2-D2 then set about destroying the torture equipment that EV-9D9.2 had constructed.
